name: Open Crypto Broker
description: The Open Crypto Broker allows to move cryptographic operations into a managed environments. This allows to enforce governance and policies as to which algorithms are allowed or not.

name: Open Key Chain Manager
description: OpenKCM serves as a central management layer for encryption of data at-rest. It comes with built-in multi-tenancy support and allows each tenant to stay in control of designing keychains and managing their lifecycle.

name: OpenBAO
description: OpenBao is an identity-based secrets and encryption management system. A secret is anything that you want to tightly control access to, such as API encryption keys, passwords, and certificates. OpenBao provides encryption services that are gated by authentication and authorization methods. Using OpenBao’s UI, CLI, or HTTP API, access to secrets and other sensitive data can be securely stored and managed, tightly controlled (restricted), and auditable.
